headline: Semi pain spreads to NBIS -17%, CRWV -14%, GLW -14%; RDDT +14% holds; desk adds META & GEN to NTNX longs

actions.line: Quarter size — VWAP overextension flagged; risk/research agree on setup, desk trims for it.
Half size — signal & risk aligned, research neutral-not-opposed; clean technical r/r.
Half size — strongest trend on the board; signal + risk clean, research neutral.

watch.line: -17% on 2× volume AH — watch for stabilization level before any fade/bounce play.

changed: Desk adds two new longs: META (quarter size, overextension caveat) and GEN (half size, strongest trend).

No new catalysts or ripple calls this scan vs prior.
caveats: AH_POST window scan as of 18:20 ET Jul 1 — prices are post-market and may gap significantly at next RTH open; all levels are stale by open.
Risk_on label is regime-model output; QQQ -1.46% and broad tech selling are inconsistent with it — treat regime as mixed in practice.
